error_signature: initial value not displayed in select input
title: Initial value not displayed in select input
symptom: The select input shows a placeholder instead of the expected initial value. Users expect the initial value to be displayed based on their configuration.
applies_when: Select input is configured with an initial value
Initial value does not match any option's value
not_this_if: Initial value matches one of the option values
root_cause: The select input component requires that the initial value be exactly equal to one of the option values, not just the label. If the initial value is set to a label instead of the corresponding value, the component defaults to showing the placeholder.
fix_steps: Check the options configured in the select input
Ensure the initial value is set to match one of the option values exactly
Save the changes and refresh the component
agent_instruction: Set the initial value of the select input to match one of the option values exactly.
